data.title: Multistack International Files 2025 Governance Statement and Appendix 4G with ASX
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Multistack International Limited ( (AU:MSI) ) has provided an announcement.

Multistack International has lodged its financial information for the year ended 31 December 2025 with the ASX, along with its corporate governance statement included in the company’s annual report. The statement, current as at 31 December 2025 and approved by the board, outlines the extent of the company’s adherence to ASX Corporate Governance Council recommendations.

The company has also submitted an Appendix 4G, which serves as a key to locate its governance disclosures and as a verification tool confirming compliance with Listing Rule 4.10.3. This filing reinforces Multistack International’s ongoing alignment with ASX governance standards and provides investors with transparency on any departures from recommended practices and the alternatives adopted.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:MSI) stock is a Sell with a A$0.01 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Multistack International Limited stock, see the AU:MSI Stock Forecast page.

More about Multistack International Limited

Multistack International Limited is an Australian-listed company whose securities trade on the ASX. The group operates through controlled entities and is subject to the ASX Listing Rules, including corporate governance and disclosure requirements applying to listed issuers.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$408.9K

data.title: PesoRama pushes Mexico expansion with two new JOi Dollar Plus stores
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from PesoRama Inc ( (TSE:PESO) ) is now available.

PesoRama is expanding its JOi Dollar Plus chain in Mexico with the opening of its 34th and 35th stores, reinforcing its footprint in key high-traffic urban markets. The company, which already operates 33 locations, continues to pursue a strategy focused on dense commercial and residential areas to capture value-conscious consumers.

Store #34 will open in Puebla’s historic center, a busy commercial and tourist hub, marking PesoRama’s second location in that state and deepening its regional presence. Store #35 will be launched inside the Parque Tepeyac retail complex in northeast Mexico City, a high-density area with more than 100 commercial establishments, underscoring the chain’s push to drive growth through strategic site selection and greater accessibility for Mexican shoppers.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:PESO) stock is a Hold with a C$0.35 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on PesoRama Inc stock, see the TSE:PESO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PESO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PESO is a Neutral.

PesoRama Inc’s overall stock score is primarily impacted by its weak financial performance, characterized by high leverage and negative profitability. While technical analysis shows some positive momentum, the valuation metrics highlight significant risks due to the company’s lack of profitability. The absence of earnings call and corporate events data limits additional insights.

To see Spark’s full report on PESO stock, click here.

More about PesoRama Inc

PesoRama Inc. is a Canadian-founded value dollar store retailer operating in Mexico under the JOi Dollar Plus brand. Launched in 2019 in Mexico City and surrounding areas, it targets high-density, high-traffic locations with a consistent assortment of low-cost household goods, pet supplies, seasonal and party items, health and beauty products, snacks, confectionery and related everyday merchandise.

Average Trading Volume: 282,793

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$64.92M

Swift Networks Group Limited ( (AU:STV) ) has provided an update.

Swift TV Ltd has notified the market of the issue of 31,674,796 unquoted performance rights under its employee incentive scheme, effective 27 March 2026. The substantial grant of performance rights is designed to support staff retention and align employee rewards with shareholder value, signalling the company’s continued reliance on equity remuneration as part of its capital and talent management strategy.

The new performance rights will not be quoted on the ASX, reflecting their role as internal incentive instruments rather than tradable securities. This move may moderately dilute existing holders over time upon vesting but is intended to incentivise management and employees to drive operational performance and long-term growth for stakeholders.

data.title: Zeria Pharmaceutical Revamps Shareholder Benefit With New IONA R Skincare Course
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Zeria Pharmaceutical Co ( (JP:4559) ) has shared an announcement.

Zeria Pharmaceutical will partially revise its shareholder benefit program for investors holding 1,000 shares or more, starting from the March 31, 2026 record date. The company will replace the existing IONA R Two-product Special Care Set with a new F Course featuring two units of the IONA R Double Action Cream.

The updated benefit focuses on a medicated beauty cream designed to improve wrinkles and prevent dark spots and freckles by suppressing melanin production. By emphasizing high-purity chondroitin and natural mineral ions for moisturizing and skin support, Zeria appears to align its shareholder incentives more closely with a flagship cosmetic product that highlights its strengths in skincare and beauty-related pharmaceuticals.

More about Zeria Pharmaceutical Co

Zeria Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. is a Japan-based pharmaceutical company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market under securities code 4559. The company develops and markets pharmaceutical and related healthcare products, including beauty and skincare items under the IONA R brand, targeting consumers seeking dermatological and cosmetic benefits.

Average Trading Volume: 87,803

Current Market Cap: Yen90.77B

Genetic Technologies ( (AU:GTG) ) has shared an announcement.

Genetic Technologies Limited has announced that director William Anthony Musgrave ceased to be a director of the company on 24 March 2026. According to the final director’s interest notice lodged with the ASX, Musgrave held no relevant interests in the company’s securities or related contracts at the time of his departure.

The filing underscores that there are no disclosed shareholdings or indirect interests associated with Musgrave following his exit from the board. This clean separation suggests limited immediate impact on the company’s ownership structure, though it marks a governance change that investors may monitor for any subsequent board or strategic adjustments.

data.title: Aero, Urano and Pegasus Boost Merger Financing to $11.5 Million
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

C2C Gold ( (TSE:UE) ) has provided an update.

Aero Energy, Urano Energy and Pegasus Resources have increased their previously announced financing to a total of up to $11.5 million amid strong investor demand. The bulk of the raise will come from up to 26.25 million Aero subscription receipts at $0.40 each, with terms of a separate charity flow-through unit financing unchanged.

The financing supports the trio’s plan to merge via court-approved arrangements into Manhattan Uranium Discovery Corp., expected to trade under the symbol MANU. Net proceeds will fund advancement of the combined uranium project portfolio in North America, repay a bridge loan, cover transaction costs and bolster working capital.

Subscription receipt proceeds will be held in escrow and released only once defined conditions, including completion of the transactions and regulatory approvals, are met. If those conditions are not satisfied by the 90-day deadline or Urano steps away from the deal, investors will be repaid their subscription price plus interest, with Aero liable for any shortfall.

Eventus Capital Corp. and PowerOne Capital Markets have been engaged as finders, underscoring institutional support for the deal structure. The financing is anticipated to close around March 23, 2026, marking a key step toward consolidating these junior uranium explorers into a better-capitalized, single North American uranium vehicle.

More about C2C Gold

Aero Energy Limited is a uranium exploration company focused on North America, controlling a district-scale land package in Saskatchewan’s Athabasca Basin. Its Strike and Murmac projects host numerous shallow drill-ready uranium targets, supported by an award-winning technical team with a track record in major discoveries.

Urano Energy Corp. and Pegasus Resources Inc. are also junior uranium-focused companies, and together with Aero they plan to form Manhattan Uranium Discovery Corp. The combined entity will concentrate on advancing a diversified uranium project portfolio across North America.

The planned merger positions the new company to leverage scale and technical expertise in the uranium sector. This strategy aims to strengthen its competitive footing amid renewed interest in nuclear energy and growing demand for uranium assets.

Average Trading Volume: 141,358

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$15.45M

Learn more about UE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

The latest update is out from Austral Resources Australia Limited ( (AU:AR1) ).

Austral Resources Australia Ltd reported that all resolutions put to shareholders at its 27 March 2026 general meeting were passed by poll, including approval of financial assistance and several equity-related measures. These outcomes confirm strong shareholder support for the company’s capital management initiatives and governance decisions.

Shareholders ratified prior share placements, approved the issue of new placement and priority shares, and endorsed incentive share grants for directors and eligible employees. The approvals underpin Austral’s ability to raise capital, strengthen its balance sheet, and align management and staff incentives with shareholder interests as it progresses its copper operations.

data.title: CSSC (Hong Kong) Shipping Announces Proposed Final 2025 Dividend With Currency Option
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

CSSC (Hong Kong) Shipping Company Limited ( (HK:3877) ) has issued an announcement.

CSSC (Hong Kong) Shipping Company Limited has proposed a final ordinary dividend of HKD 0.05 per share for the financial year ended 31 December 2025, with payment scheduled for 31 August 2026, subject to shareholder approval. Investors in the Hong Kong register will be able to elect to receive the dividend in either Hong Kong dollars or renminbi, with the RMB amount, exchange rate, key record dates and ex-dividend date to be announced, signaling the company’s continued practice of cash returns to shareholders and providing flexibility for currency preference.

The announcement outlines that partial currency election will be available, and details regarding the closing date for currency elections and the book closure period are yet to be confirmed. The board composition is also reaffirmed, indicating stable governance as the company moves toward the 2025 year-end distribution, a factor that may reassure shareholders about oversight and continuity in capital management policies.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:3877) stock is a Buy with a HK$2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CSSC (Hong Kong) Shipping Company Limited stock, see the HK:3877 Stock Forecast page.

More about CSSC (Hong Kong) Shipping Company Limited

CSSC (Hong Kong) Shipping Company Limited is a Hong Kong-listed equity issuer engaged in the shipping and maritime financing sector, providing vessel-related leasing and financial services to clients in the regional and international shipping markets. The company is traded under stock code 03877 on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and maintains its share register through Computershare Hong Kong Investor Services Limited.

Average Trading Volume: 26,121,229

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$14.94B
